inputs.incident: The validate CI job failed for 40 minutes after a schema change landed on main.

expected_outputs.postmortem:
# Postmortem: validate CI red for 40m

Timeline: 14:02 schema change merged [commit abc123]; 14:05 validate job fails [ci-run-991]; 14:42 revert merged. Impact: main red 40m, no release blocked. Causes: sample not updated with schema. Unknown: why pre-merge CI passed. Action items below.

items.action: Add a sample-vs-schema check to pre-merge CI
Investigate why pre-merge CI was green

notes: Produces a blameless, source-cited postmortem with owned action items.
